title: INI Configuration Management Flow
interaction_flow: CLI → main(): php datadog-setup.php config [list|get|set] --php-bin <bin> -d <setting>[=<value>]
main() → parse_validate_user_options(): parse and normalize CLI args
parse_validate_user_options() → parse_cli_arguments(): raw argv parsing
parse_validate_user_options() → main(): return {cmd: CMD_CONFIG_*, opts: normalizedOptions}
main() → cmd_config_list(options) [if CMD_CONFIG_LIST]
main() → cmd_config_get(options) [if CMD_CONFIG_GET]
main() → cmd_config_set(options) [if CMD_CONFIG_SET]
--- config list flow ---
cmd_config_list(options) → config_list(options): get all Datadog INI settings
config_list() → get_ini_settings('','',''): returns array of known Datadog settings (slice off first 3 extension entries)
config_list() → require_binaries_or_exit(options): returns {command => fullPath} map
config_list() → ini_values(fullPath): exec php -i, parse INI_MAIN / INI_SCANDIR / EXTENSION_DIR
config_list() → find_all_ini_files(phpProps): scan conf.d dirs, prioritise 98-ddtrace.ini
config_list() → parse_ini_file(iniFilePath): read and parse each INI file
config_list() → new IniRecord(): populate setting/currentValue/defaultValue/iniFile/binary
cmd_config_list() → IniRecord::println(): print 'setting = value; default: X, binary: Y, INI file: Z'
--- config get flow ---
cmd_config_get(options): check options['d'] exists, else print_help()
cmd_config_get() → config_list(options): reuse full list, index by setting name
cmd_config_get(): for each -d setting, if found → IniRecord::println(), else echo '; setting = undefined; is missing in INI files'
--- config set flow ---
cmd_config_set(options): check options['d'] exists, else print_help()
cmd_config_set() → require_binaries_or_exit(options): get selected PHP binaries
cmd_config_set(): for each binary → ini_values(fullPath)
cmd_config_set(): for each -d cliIniSetting → parse_ini_setting(cliIniSetting)
parse_ini_setting(setting): explode on '=', validate via parse_ini_string(), return [key, value] or false
cmd_config_set() → find_all_ini_files(phpProps): get all INI file paths
--- Pass 1: update active (uncommented) entries ---
cmd_config_set() → update_ini_setting(setting, iniFile, promoteComment=false): regex replace uncommented key=value
update_ini_setting(): file_get_contents(iniFile) → preg_replace(regex, 'key = value') → file_put_contents(iniFile)
update_ini_setting() → cmd_config_set(): return count (0=not found, >0=updated, false=error)
cmd_config_set(): if matchCount >= 2 → warn about duplicates; if matchCount >= 1 → done for this setting
--- Pass 2: promote commented entries ---
cmd_config_set() → update_ini_setting(setting, iniFile, promoteComment=true): regex includes leading ';' chars, replaces first match only
cmd_config_set(): if matchCount >= 1 → done (promoted from comment)
--- Pass 3: append to main INI file ---
cmd_config_set() → find_main_ini_files(phpProps): find 98-ddtrace.ini or INI file containing 'extension = ddtrace'
cmd_config_set(): if file missing → file_put_contents(iniFile, '') to create it
cmd_config_set(): file_get_contents(iniFile) → append 'key = value' → file_put_contents(iniFile)
cmd_config_set(): if unable to set in any file → exit(1)
--- map_env_to_ini (utility, used during install) ---
map_env_to_ini(env): DD_TRACE_* → datadog.trace.*, DD_PROFILING_* → datadog.profiling.*, DD_APPSEC_* → datadog.appsec.*, DD_ENV → datadog.env
--- modify_ini_file (used in install, not config sub-commands) ---
modify_ini_file(iniFilePath, callback): file_get_contents → callback(content) → file_put_contents if changed
key_data_structures: IniRecord: {setting: string, currentValue: string, defaultValue: string, iniFile: string, binary: string}
parse_ini_setting() returns: [key: string, value: string] | false
ini_values() returns: {PHP_VER, INI_MAIN, INI_SCANDIR, EXTENSION_DIR, THREAD_SAFETY, PHP_API, IS_DEBUG}
options['d']: array of '-d key=value' CLI settings
options[OPT_PHP_BIN]: array of PHP binary paths or 'all'
key_relationships: cmd_config_set depends_on parse_ini_setting, update_ini_setting, find_all_ini_files, find_main_ini_files
config_list depends_on find_all_ini_files, ini_values, get_ini_settings, require_binaries_or_exit, IniRecord
modify_ini_file reads_writes INI File (filesystem) via callback
branching_logic: cmd_config_set Pass 1: search all INI files for uncommented setting; if matchCount>=1 → done
cmd_config_set Pass 2: search all INI files for commented setting (promoteComment=true); if matchCount>=1 → done
cmd_config_set Pass 3: append to main INI file(s); create file if missing; exit(1) if all fail
update_ini_setting: promoteComment=false uses regex without leading ';'; promoteComment=true allows ';' prefix; replaces 1 vs all occurrences
map_env_to_ini: DD_TRACE_*/DD_PROFILING_*/DD_APPSEC_* use sub-namespace; others (DD_ENV, DD_SERVICE) map flat under 'datadog.'
important_notes: config sub-commands only manage Datadog-specific INI settings (datadog.*). modify_ini_file/map_env_to_ini are install-time utilities. 98-ddtrace.ini is the canonical default file, prioritised in all scans. Debian-based distros require handling split SAPI conf.d dirs (cli/apache2/fpm). Multiple INI file matches trigger a duplicate warning.
